name: Moze
desc: A Shadow Guard of the Yaoqing, Moze is taciturn and solitary, always acting on his own.\nAs an expert in intelligence services and other operations that must remain covert, Moze rarely shows himself before others. The moment he reveals his blade usually spells doom for his enemies.\nHe commands a vast wealth of assassination techniques, coupled with an extraordinary obsession for orderliness and cleanliness.

1.name: Oathkeeper
1.desc: After entering battle, Moze regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy. Each time the <u>Additional DMG</u> from his Talent is triggered, Moze regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

2.name: Wrathbearer
2.desc: When all allies deal DMG to the enemy target marked as "Prey," increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Deathchaser
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Heathprowler
4.desc: When using Ultimate, increases the DMG dealt by Moze by <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Truthbender
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Faithbinder
6.desc: Increases the DMG multiplier of the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

122301.name: Hurlthorn
122301.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK to one designated enemy target.
122301.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

122302.name: Fleetwinged Raid
122302.desc: Marks a designated single enemy target as "Prey" and deals to it Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK, and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points of Charge.\nWhen there are no other characters on the field that are capable of combat, Moze cannot use his Skill and dispels the enemy's "Prey" state.
122302.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Marks one enemy as "Prey"</color> and deals Lightning DMG to it. Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> points of Charge.

122303.name: <unbreak>Dash In,</unbreak> <unbreak>Gash Out</unbreak>
122303.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK to one designated enemy target, and launches the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against this target. If the target is defeated before this <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> is used, then launches the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against a random single enemy instead.
122303.simple_desc: Deals Lightning DMG to one enemy, and launches Talent's <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

122304.name: Cascading Featherblade
122304.desc: When "Prey" exists on the field, Moze will enter the <u>Departed</u> state.\nAfter ally targets attack "Prey," Moze will additionally deal 1 instance of Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK and consumes 1 point of Charge. For every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge consumed, Moze launches 1 <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> to "Prey," dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK. When Charge reaches 0, dispels the target's "Prey" state and resets the tally of Charge points required to launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>. Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> does not consume Charge.
122304.simple_desc: When "Prey" exists on the field, Moze will enter the <color=#f29e38ff><u>Departed</u></color> state.\nAfter allies attack "Prey," Moze deals Lightning <color=#f29e38ff><u>Additional DMG</u></color> and consumes 1 Charge point. For every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge consumed, Moze launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> on "Prey," dealing Lightning DMG. When Charge is 0, dispels the target's "Prey" state.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000016.name: Departed
10000016.desc: Targets in the Departed state cannot be designated as ability targets and will not appear in the Action Order.

122306.name: Attack
122306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122307.name: Bated Wings
122307.desc: After using Technique, enters the Stealth state for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). While in Stealth, Moze is undetectable by enemies. If Moze attacks enemies to enter combat while in Stealth, increases DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
122307.simple_desc: Enters the Stealth state. Attacking enemies to enter combat while in Stealth increases DMG.

1.point_desc: After using Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s). This effect can trigger again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: When Moze dispels his <u>Departed</u> state, his <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. At the start of each wave, Moze's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000016.name: Departed
10000016.desc: Targets in the Departed state cannot be designated as ability targets and will not appear in the Action Order.

1.point_desc: When dealing DMG by using Ultimate, it is considered as having launched a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>. The <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG taken by the "Prey" increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
